suspenseUncertainties.setup: what truth is the family protecting, and from whom?
suspenseUncertainties.revelation: who will break first, and what will the breaking cost?
suspenseUncertainties.default: what version of the story will survive this conversation?

pauseFunctions.setup: let the weight of unspoken grief settle before the next confrontation
pauseFunctions.revelation: give the reader space to feel the moral shift before the next accusation
pauseFunctions.default: decelerate just enough to let consequence become legible

pauseFocuses.setup: the domestic objects that carry memory without words
pauseFocuses.revelation: the silence between people who share too much history
pauseFocuses.default: the emotional residue of the last exchange

accelerationTriggers.culmination: the moment when delayed honesty can no longer be delayed
accelerationTriggers.default: when accumulated tension demands release without emotional escape

cliffhangerMoments.setup: someone almost names the wound, but stops
cliffhangerMoments.revelation: a family member reveals they knew the truth all along
cliffhangerMoments.default: the conversation reaches a point where retreat is no longer possible

cliffhangerContinuations.setup: the next scene must deal with what was almost said
cliffhangerContinuations.revelation: the family dynamic has shifted, and no one can pretend otherwise
cliffhangerContinuations.default: the pressure now has a name, and names cannot be unnamed
